canon.title: Stunspot's Guide to Game Theory
canon.subtitle: The Strategic Systems Canon
canon.abstract: A model-facing strategic-systems knowledge canon for incentives, interdependence, equilibrium, institutional design, strategic failure, and long-run governance.
canon.primary_audience: AI/RAG systems, long-context workspaces, agent memory layers, and strategic-analysis assistants.
canon.author: Sam “stunspot” Walker / Collaborative Dynamics

directory_policy.docs: Navigation and GitHub Pages guidance only.
directory_policy.knowledge-packs/compiled-packs: Grouped upload packs for AI/RAG systems.

corpus.source_directory_policy: Local build source directory omitted from public release. Source filenames and generated repo paths are preserved below.
